Akabeko.description: Your first attack each combat deals 8 *Vigor|additional damage*.

Anchor.flavor: Holding this miniature trinket, you feel heavier and more stable.

Astrolabe.description: Upon pickup, choose and Transform 3 cards, then Upgrade them.
Astrolabe.flavor: A tool to glean invaluable knowledge from the stars.

BagOfPreparation.description:
该遗物允许玩家在首回合额外抽两张牌。
尽管它仅仅是个普通遗物，但效果仍然非常强大。其提供的额外抽牌可以与众多遗物和卡牌起到不错甚至强大的协同作用，并且额外的抽牌可以为玩家提供更多的选择与更强的应对能力。
但是，若玩家抽到了许多关键牌却无法将它们全部打出，则此遗物反而起到副作用。

BloodyIdol.description:
该遗物为“第二阶段”专属事件被遗忘的祭坛所给予，并且需要以转化。
打败敌人会固定掉落金币，拾取金币会回复5点生命值。该遗物效果会类似。

Brimstone.description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 *Strength* and ALL enemies gain 1 *Strength*.

BurningBlood.description: At the end of combat, heal 6 HP.
BurningBlood.flavor: Your body's own blood burns with an undying rage.

Calipers.description: At the start of your turn, lose 15 Block rather than all of your Block.
Calipers.flavor: Mechanical precision leads to greatness" - The Architect

Cauldron.flavor: The Merchant is actually a rather skilled potion brewer. Buy 4 get 1 free.

Circlet.description: Collect as many as you can.
Circlet.flavor: You ran out of relics to find. Impressive!

CrackedCore.description: 破损核心是故障机器人的初始遗物，该遗物可被BOSS宝箱中获得的替换，从而使得效果改变。

Damaru.description: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Mantra.
Damaru.flavor: The sound of the small drum keeps your mind awake, revealing a path forward.

Duality.description: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 1 temporary *Dexterity*.
Duality.flavor: And the sun was extinguished forever, as if curtains fell before it." - Zoroth

Ectoplasm.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. You can no longer gain Gold.
Ectoplasm.flavor: This blob of slime and energy seems to pulse with life.

Enchiridion.description: At the start of each combat, add a random Power card to your hand. It costs 0 until the end of turn.
Enchiridion.flavor: The legendary journal of an ancient lich.

related_links.display: 每周更新52:发售日确认+价格提升

related_links.page: 每周更新7:妥当安排好一切
related_links.display: 每周更新7:妥当安排好一切

FaceOfCleric.description: Raise your Max HP by 1 after each combat.

Ginger.description: You can no longer become Weakened.
Ginger.flavor: A potent tool in many tonics.

Girya.description: You can now gain *Strength* at Rest Sites. (3 times max)
Girya.flavor: This Girya is unfathomably heavy. You could train with this to get significantly stronger.

Kunai.description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 *Dexterity*.
Kunai.flavor: A blade favored by assassins for its lethality at range.

Lantern.description: Gain 1 Energy on the first turn of each combat.
Lantern.flavor: An eerie lantern which illuminates only for the wielder.

Mango.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 14.
Mango.flavor: The most coveted forgotten fruit. Impeccably preserved with no signs of Spireblight.

Matryoshka.description: The next 2 chests you open contain 2 Relics. (Excludes boss chests)
Matryoshka.flavor: A stackable set of painted dolls. The paint depicts an unknown bird with white eyes and blue feathers.

Melange.description: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, Scry 3.
Melange.flavor: Mysterious sands from an unknown origin. Smells of cinnamon.

Necronomicon.description: The first Attack played each turn that costs 2 or more is played twice. When you take this relic, become Cursed.
Necronomicon.flavor: Only a fool would try and harness this evil power. At night your dreams are haunted by images of the book devouring your mind.

NlothsGift.description: 在事件恩洛斯中，用一件随机遗物换取此遗物。

Nunchaku.description: Every time you play 10 Attacks, gain 1 Energy.
Nunchaku.flavor: A good training tool. Improves the posture and agility of the wielder.

Omamori.description: Negate the next 2 Curses you obtain.
Omamori.flavor: A common charm for staving off vile spirits. This one seems to possess a spark of divine energy.

Orichalcum.description: If you end your turn without *Block*, gain 6 *Block*.
Orichalcum.flavor: A green tinted metal of an unknown origin. Seemingly indestructible.

Orrery.description: Choose and add 5 cards to your deck.
Orrery.flavor: Once you understand the universe..." - Zoroth

Pantograph.description: At the start of boss combats, heal 25 HP.
Pantograph.flavor: Solid foundations are not accidental. Tools for planning are a must." - The Architect

Pear.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 10.
Pear.flavor: A common fruit before the Spireblight.

Pocketwatch.description: Whenever you play 3 or less cards in a turn, draw 3 additional cards at the start of your next turn.
Pocketwatch.flavor: The hands seem stuck on the 3 o'clock position.

RedMask.description: 在事件蒙面强盗中，赢得战斗胜利可以获得此遗物。 在事件红面具大人之墓中，可以以失去所有金币为代价换取此遗物。如果已经拥有此遗物，则可以选择获得222金币。

RingOfTheSerpent.description: Replaces [Ring of the Snake]. At the start of your turn, draw 1 additional card.
RingOfTheSerpent.flavor: Your ring has morphed and changed forms.

RingOfTheSnake.description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 additional cards.
RingOfTheSnake.flavor: Made from a fossilized snake. Represents great skill as a huntress.

Shovel.description: You can now Dig for loot at Rest Sites.
Shovel.flavor: The Spire houses all number of relics from past civilizations and powerful adventurers lost to time. Time to go dig them up!

Shuriken.description: Every time you play 3 Attacks in a single turn, gain 1 *Strength*.
Shuriken.flavor: Lightweight throwing weapons. Recommend going for the eyes.

SingingBowl.description: When adding cards to your deck, you may gain +2 Max HP instead.
SingingBowl.flavor: This well-used artifact rings out with a beautiful melody when struck.

Sozu.description: Gain 1 Energy at the start of each turn. You can no longer obtain potions.
Sozu.flavor: You notice that magical liquids seem to lose their properties when near this relic.

SpiritPoop.description: 在篝火精灵事件中将诅咒丢入篝火中以获得此遗物。

Strawberry.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 7.
Strawberry.flavor: Delicious! Haven't seen any of these since the blight." - Ranwid

Sundial.description: Every 3 times you shuffle your draw pile, gain 2 Energy.
Sundial.flavor: Early man's foolish obsession with time caused them to look to the sky for guidance, hoping for something permanent." - Zoroth

Tingsha.description: Whenever you discard a card during your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy for each card discarded.
Tingsha.flavor: The sound this instrument generates seems to be capable of reverberating to painful levels of volume.

Toolbox.description: At the start of each combat, choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards and add the chosen card into your hand.

Torii.description: Whenever you would receive 5 or less unblocked Attack damage, reduce it to 1.
Torii.flavor: Holding the small Torii, you feel a sense of calm and safety drift through your mind.

Turnip.description: You can no longer become Frail.

Vajra.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 *Strength*.
Vajra.flavor: An ornamental relic given to warriors displaying glory in battle.

Whetstone.description: Upon pick up, Upgrade 2 random Attacks.
Whetstone.flavor: Flesh never beats steel." - Kublai the Great
